name: GH_ParamHashFields
summary: Enumerates all accepted fields for hashing parameter data.

enum_values.name: Input
enum_values.summary: Input parameters are taken into account.

enum_values.name: Output
enum_values.summary: Output parameters are taken into account.

enum_values.name: InputAndOutput
enum_values.summary: Input and output parameters are taken into account.

enum_values.name: InstanceId
enum_values.summary: Parameter instance ID is taken into account.

enum_values.name: NickName
enum_values.summary: Parameter nickname is taken into account.

enum_values.name: Access
enum_values.summary: Parameter access (item, list, tree) is taken into account.

enum_values.name: TypeId
enum_values.summary: Parameter type code is taken into account.

enum_values.name: PersistentData
enum_values.summary: Parameter persistent data is taken into account.

enum_values.name: Expression
enum_values.summary: Parameter Expression is taken into account.

enum_values.name: TypeHint
enum_values.summary: Parameter typehint is taken into account.

enum_values.name: Sources
enum_values.summary: Parameter source IDs are taken into account.

enum_values.name: Recipients
enum_values.summary: Parameter recipient IDs are taken into account.

enum_values.name: SourcesAndRecipients
enum_values.summary: Parameter sources and recipients are taken into account.

enum_values.name: SerialData
enum_values.summary: Parameter serialization byte array is taken into account.
